'''shachaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yahrtzeit|yahrtzeit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yahrtzeit|yahrtzeit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shachaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæchæjæth|shæchæjæth]] || [[word:shæchæjæj|shæchæjæj]] || [[word:shæchæjæsh|shæchæjæsh]] || [[word:shæchæjæ|shæchæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachachajath|shachachajath]] || [[word:shachachajaj|shachachajaj]] || [[word:shachachajash|shachachajash]] || [[word:shachachaja|shachachaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachajath|shachajath]] || [[word:shachajaj|shachajaj]] || [[word:shachajash|shachajash]] || [[word:shachaja|shachaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachafjath|shachafjath]] || [[word:shachafjaj|shachafjaj]] || [[word:shachafjash|shachafjash]] || [[word:shachafjaf|shachafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shachajatha|shachajatha]] || [[word:shachajaja|shachajaja]] || [[word:shachajasha|shachajasha]] || [[word:shachajaka|shachajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shachajath|shachajath]] || [[word:shachajaj|shachajaj]] || [[word:shachajash|shachajash]] || [[word:shachaja|shachaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shachajathal|shachajathal]] || [[word:shachajajal|shachajajal]] || [[word:shachajashal|shachajashal]] || [[word:shachajakal|shachajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shachajathatha|shachajathatha]] || [[word:shachajajaja|shachajajaja]] || [[word:shachajashasha|shachajashasha]] || [[word:shachajaka|shachajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shachajathan|shachajathan]] || [[word:shachajajan|shachajajan]] || [[word:shachajashan|shachajashan]] || [[word:shachajakan|shachajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shachajathaoro|shachajathaoro]] || [[word:shachajajaoro|shachajajaoro]] || [[word:shachajashaoro|shachajashaoro]] || [[word:shachajakaoro|shachajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
